records.question: Which K-12 public schools in CA have the name Keyes to Learning Charter, are located at PO Box 519 with zip 95328 and latitude 37.552793, have magnet status 0.0, and have SAT scores with rtype S?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.soctype = 'K-12 Schools (Public)' AND satscores.rtype = 'S' AND schools.zip = '95328' AND schools.mailstreet = 'PO Box 519' AND schools.latitude = 37.552793 AND schools.state = 'CA' AND schools.magnet = 0.0 AND schools.school = 'Keyes to Learning Charter'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT schools.CDSCode
FROM schools
LEFT JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
LEFT JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.SOCType = 'K-12 Schools (Public)'
  AND schools.Zip = '95328'
  AND schools.MailStreet = 'PO Box 519'
  AND schools.Latitude = 37.552793
  AND schools.State = 'CA'
  AND schools.Magnet = 0.0
  AND schools.School = 'Keyes to Learning Charter'
  AND frpm.CDSCode IS NOT NULL
  AND satscores.cds IS NOT NULL
  AND satscores.rtype = 'S'

records.question: Which active, non-virtual charter schools serving grades 9-12 have a doc of 54, longitude exactly -122.40215, and were last updated on or before 2015-06-18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.virtual = 'N' AND schools.lastupdate <= '2015-06-18' AND schools.doc = '54' AND schools.statustype = 'Active' AND schools.charter = 1.0 AND schools.gsserved = '9-12' AND schools.longitude = -122.40215
records.pred_sql:
SELECT schools.CDSCode
FROM schools
LEFT JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.Virtual = 'N'
  AND schools.LastUpdate <= '2015-06-18'
  AND schools.DOC = '54'
  AND schools.StatusType = 'Active'
  AND schools.Charter = 1.0
  AND schools.GSserved = '9-12'
  AND schools.Longitude = -122.40215
  AND satscores.cds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY schools.CDSCode

records.question: What schools named Math, Science, & Technology Magnet Academy at Roosevelt High belong to a Unified School District and have been updated on or after 2016-03-03?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.school = 'Math, Science, & Technology Magnet Academy at Roosevelt High' AND schools.doctype = 'Unified School District' AND schools.lastupdate >= '2016-03-03'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.CDSCode
FROM schools s
INNER JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE s.School = 'Math, Science, & Technology Magnet Academy at Roosevelt High'
  AND s.DOCType = 'Unified School District'
  AND s.LastUpdate >= '2016-03-03'

records.question: What schools have an ext value exactly 4000 and where doc is 56?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.ext = '4000' AND schools.doc = '56'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT schools.CDSCode
FROM schools
LEFT JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
LEFT JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.Ext = '4000'
  AND schools.DOC = '56'
  AND frpm.CDSCode IS NOT NULL
  AND satscores.cds IS NOT NULL

records.question: Where is Broadway High located if it is a Continuation High School with the edopsname Continuation School, has a phone number of (408) 535-6285, and an IRC value of exactly 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.cdscode = frpm.cdscode
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE frpm.irc = 0.0 AND schools.school = 'Broadway High' AND schools.soctype = 'Continuation High Schools' AND schools.edopsname = 'Continuation School' AND schools.phone = '(408) 535-6285'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.CDSCode
FROM schools s
WHERE s.School = 'Broadway High'
  AND s.SOCType = 'Continuation High Schools'
  AND s.EdOpsName = 'Continuation School'
  AND s.Phone = '(408) 535-6285'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM frpm f
    WHERE f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
      AND f.IRC = 0.0
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM satscores ss
    WHERE ss.cds = s.CDSCode
  )

records.question: Which schools with a website exactly www.powayusd.com/pusdmces have a magnet value of at most 0.0?

SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
WHERE schools.magnet <= 0.0 AND schools.website = 'www.powayusd.com/pusdmces'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT schools.CDSCode
FROM schools
WHERE schools.Magnet <= 0.0
AND schools.Website = 'www.powayusd.com/pusdmces'

records.question: Which schools have a latitude that is exactly 33.781043?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
JOIN satscores ON schools.cdscode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.latitude = 33.781043
records.pred_sql:
SELECT schools.CDSCode
FROM schools
INNER JOIN satscores ON schools.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE schools.Latitude = 33.781043
GROUP BY schools.CDSCode

records.question: What schools in the Holtville Unified district are located exactly at latitude 32.816511 with the address 522 West Eighth St., have a doctype of Unified School District, are not virtual, and have magnet and charter values of at least 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT schools.cdscode FROM schools
WHERE schools.magnet >= 0.0 AND schools.latitude = 32.816511 AND schools.mailstrabr = '522 West Eighth St.' AND schools.district = 'Holtville Unified' AND schools.doctype = 'Unified School District' AND schools.virtual = 'N' AND schools.charter >= 0.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT schools.CDSCode
FROM schools
WHERE schools.Magnet >= 0.0
  AND schools.Latitude = 32.816511
  AND schools.MailStrAbr = '522 West Eighth St.'
  AND schools.District = 'Holtville Unified'
  AND schools.DOCType = 'Unified School District'
  AND schools.Virtual = 'N'
  AND schools.Charter >= 0.0
